examples: The old stone cattle trough still sits by the main entrance.
This chair grows in a sliding flower trough, and each "foot" grows a willow tree.
The proportion of working-age people with jobs is lower than in the trough of the recession.
Golzernsee itself is a small alpine lake in a glacial trough, perfect for summer swims and picnics.
The analyst says the stock is trading at 12x pro forma EPS, near a trough valuation.
